title: Vima-Da-Boda's lightsaber

{{Quote|Brave little Jedi! But really such an old lightsaber is not a worthy weapon for you!|[[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] to Leia before destroying it.|<ref name="DE 4" />}}
[[Vima-Da-Boda]] owned a '''lightsaber''', originally built in [[10,000 BBY]].<ref name="endnotes" />

By [[4000 BBY/Legends|4000 BBY]] it was on [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]], where it was left with the other [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Light side artifact|artifacts]] covered by the [[Cron Supernova/Legends|Cron Supernova]]. In [[790 BBY]], an [[Archaeology/Legends|archaeological]] dig uncovered it, and it eventually fell into the hands of a [[Unidentified female Jedi Master|Female Jedi Master]]. This Master gave it to [[Vima-Da-Boda's Master|her Padawan]], who gave it to Vima-Da-Boda.<ref name="endnotes" />

[[File:VimaDaBodasLightsaberDestruction-DarkEmpire4.png|thumb|Palpatine destroying the lightsaber]]
When Vima left the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] around [[100 BBY/Legends|100 BBY]], she kept the lightsaber with her,<ref name="endnotes" /> enclosed in a protective case. In [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]], on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]], she gave it to [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]].<ref name="DE 3">[[Dark Empire 3|''Dark Empire'' 3]]</ref> On [[Byss/Legends|Byss]], Leia used it to slice the hand off of an [[Imperial Sentinel]], before the resurrected [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] made it explode.<ref name="DE 4" />

{{Weapon-stub}}

==Continuity==
Vima-Da-Boda's lightsaber was constructed around 10,000 BBY,<ref name="endnotes" /> yet it was not a [[protosaber]],<ref name="DE 4" /> despite the Jedi still using the latter by [[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]].<ref name="Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith 1">[[Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith 1|''Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith'' 1]]</ref>
